EnumProperty.Name: CrtSysDriverModel
EnumProperty.Description: Select the crtsys entry point for this WDM or minifilter project.

EnumValue.Name: Default
EnumValue.Description: Keep the project's normal WDM or minifilter entry point.

EnumValue.Name: NtlWdm
EnumValue.Description: Use the NTL WDM entry point. Valid for WDM projects, not KMDF or ExportDriver projects.

EnumValue.Name: NtlMinifilter
EnumValue.Description: Use the NTL Filter Manager entry point. Valid for minifilter projects.
